title: Advanced Calculus: Taylor's Theorem Review
desc: Explores Taylor's Theorem with Peano, Lagrange, and Cauchy remainder forms for function approximation.

title: Advanced Calculus Series Convergence Analysis
desc: Analyzing convergence of six complex series using comparison, ratio, and root tests.

title: Advanced Calculus Surface and Curve Integrals
desc: Solutions for surface integrals, Stokes' theorem, and closed curve calculations.

title: Power Series Convergence and Summation Formulas
desc: Analyzing convergence domains and proving summation formulas for ln(1+x) and π/4.

title: Advanced Calculus: Metrics and Inequalities
desc: Proving metric properties and Cauchy-Schwarz inequality in function spaces.

title: Advanced Calculus Homework on Minima and Closed Sets
desc: Proving existence of minima for functions and closedness of the unit circle.

title: Advanced Calculus Partial Derivative Exercises
desc: A set of partial derivative problems with solutions, covering chain rule and higher-order derivatives.

title: Implicit Function Theorem Application in Calculus
desc: Analyzing a cubic equation to prove implicit function existence and compute partial derivatives.

title: Advanced Calculus Critical Points Analysis
desc: Finding and classifying critical points of multivariable functions using partial derivatives.

title: Advanced Calculus Integration Problems
desc: Solving area and volume integrals using coordinate transformations in multivariable calculus.

title: Advanced Calculus: Surface Area and Centroids
desc: Calculating surface area for ellipsoids, spheres, and tori using double integrals.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Proofs and Trigonometry
desc: Proving a complex modulus identity and deriving trigonometric formulas using Euler's formula.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Residue Theorem Applications
desc: Solving integrals using the residue theorem with detailed step-by-step calculations.

title: Complex Analysis: Residue Theorem Applications
desc: Using the residue theorem to evaluate challenging improper integrals with branch cuts.

title: Complex Functions Homework: Trigonometric Identities
desc: Proofs of complex sine/cosine addition formulas and hyperbolic identities.

title: Analyzing Multivalued Functions and Branch Points
desc: A technical analysis of multivalued complex functions, their branch points, and path-dependent evaluations.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Contour Integrals
desc: Solutions for contour integrals and Poisson formula in complex analysis.

title: Complex Analysis Homework on Series Convergence
desc: Analyzing convergence of positive and complex series with counterexamples.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Series Convergence
desc: Analyzing convergence radii, sum functions, and series sums in complex analysis.

title: Complex Analysis: Taylor Series and Convergence
desc: Expanding secant, logarithmic, and square root functions into Taylor series with convergence radii.

title: Complex Analysis: Laurent Series Expansions
desc: Step-by-step Laurent expansions for rational and logarithmic functions in complex analysis.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Analytic Continuation
desc: Proving analytic continuation and identifying singularities in complex function series.

title: Spherical Harmonics Expansion and PDE Solutions
desc: Expanding functions in spherical harmonics and solving Poisson's equation with boundary conditions.

title: Math Physics Equations Homework Solutions
desc: Integral calculations and Bessel function identities in mathematical physics.

title: Critical Radius in Nuclear Diffusion Problems
desc: Analyzes critical radii for cylindrical and spherical uranium blocks using diffusion equations and Bessel functions.

title: Delta Function Properties and Proofs
desc: Mathematical proofs for delta function identities in various coordinate systems.

title: Solving Forced Vibration with Laplace Transform
desc: A step-by-step solution to a damped oscillator driven by a harmonic force using Laplace transforms.

title: Green's Function for 1D Boundary Value Problem
desc: Deriving and applying Green's function to solve a differential equation with boundary conditions.

title: Solving Laplace's Equation with Separation of Variables
desc: A step-by-step solution to a Laplace equation with mixed boundary conditions using separation of variables.

title: Solving Heat Equation with Sinusoidal Boundary
desc: Decomposing and solving a heat equation using eigenfunction expansion and separation of variables.
